signals.headline: Solana ETF Inflows Confirmed on April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana ETF Inflows Confirmed on April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs recorded $5.04 million in net inflows on April 16, 2026, following $5.36 million the prior day, with cumulative net assets at $835 million, signaling strong institutional demand that could support price momentum amid recent Solana surges to $86.55[3][4].

signals.headline: Iran Signals Peace Talks with U
signals.raw:
Iran Signals Peace Talks with U.S., Fueling Crypto Surge Including Solana, Ethereum, XRP | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Iran's signal to resume peace talks with the U.S. drove Bitcoin above $75,000, Ethereum up 8.6% to $2,377, Solana up 6.3% to $86.55, and XRP up 4.2% to $1.38, easing Middle East tensions that had pressured markets[3].

signals.raw:
Tether Backs $150M Solana Exploit Recovery Plan | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.raw:
XRP CLARITY Act Senate Markup Looms Mid-April, ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M | YES | MED confidence**
